title: Poongkaatrilae Song Lyrics Uyire
stanzas:
Poongaatrile un swasathai
thaniyaaga thaedi paarthen
kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe
adhai thaedi thaedi paarthen

uyirin thuli kaayum munne
en vizhi unai kaanum kanne
en jeevan oayum munne
oadodi vaa....

Poongaatrile un swasathai
thaniyaaga thaedi paarthen
kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe

Kaatrin Alaivarisai ketkindratha
kaetkum paatil oru uyir
vidum kanneer valikindratha
nenju nenaikindrathaa
idhayam karugum oru
vaasam varugirathaa

kaatril kanneerai yaetri
kavidhai sendhenai ootri
kanne un vaasal serthen
oayum jeevam oadum munne
oadoadi vaa...

Poongaatrile un swasathai
thaniyaaga thaedi paarthen
kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe

uyirin thuli kaayum munne
en vizhi unai kaanum kanne
en jeevan oayum munne
oadodi vaa.

Poongaatrile un swasathai
thaniyaaga thaedi paarthen
kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe

Vaanam engum un binbam
aanaal kaiyyil seravillai
kaatril engum un vaasam
verum vaasam vazhkai illai

uyirai vaerodu killi
en sendheeyil thalli
engae sendraayo kalli
oayum jeevan odum munne
oadodi vaa....

Poongaatrile un swasathai
thaniyaaga thaedi paarthen
kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe
adhai thaedi thaedi paarthen

uyirin thuli kaayum munne
en vizhi unai kaanum kanne
en jeevan oayum munne
oadodi vaa....

kadalin mel oru thuli veelndhadhe
adhai thaedi thaedi paarthen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poongkaatrilae?

The song Poongkaatrilae expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of Uyire related to this song?

In Uyire, this song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and the challenges faced in their relationship.

Who are the singers of Poongkaatrilae?

The song features the beautiful voices of Swarnalatha and Unni Menon.

Who composed the music for Poongkaatrilae?

The music for Poongkaatrilae was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was Poongkaatrilae released?

The song was released on August 21, 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poongkaatrilae, the protagonists express their deep yearning and affection for each other amidst life's challenges. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and romantic longing. It beautifully captures the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for moments of celebration and reflection. As part of the film Uyire, it plays a pivotal role in illustrating the emotional landscape of the characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poongkaatrilae from Uyire is a mesmerizing duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Swarnalatha and Unni Menon, paired with AR Rahman's soulful composition, this song takes you on an emotional journey. Experience the magic of Vairamuthu's lyrics that beautifully express the depths of romance.
stanzaMeanings: If there is a pain in the eyes, dreams will not come.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone. I looked for a drop of dew on the ocean.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone.
Listening to the whispers of the wind, I wonder if the heart is thinking of the tears that flow from the eyes, and if a home will come that warms the heart.
I send tears in the wind, and I will reach your door. Come, my life, let’s run together.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone.
In front of me, my eyes see you, my life, come, let’s run together.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone.
If there is a pain in the eyes, dreams will not come.
The sky is everywhere, but there is no connection in my hands. The wind carries your scent, but life is just a scent without you.
The soul is like a bird, where did it fly away? Come, my life, let’s run together.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone. I looked for a drop of dew on the ocean.
In front of me, my eyes see you, my life, come, let’s run together.
In the flower garden, I searched for your breath alone. I looked for a drop of dew on the ocean.
